DLPS Notify — Installation
==========================

1. Right-click (or Control-click) "Install.command" and choose "Open".
2. In the dialog, click "Open" — this is needed once because the app is not
   notarized by Apple. It is safe.
3. DLPS Notify installs into your Applications folder and appears in the menu
   bar as a game-controller icon (top-right).

That's it. The app checks the site on an interval and notifies you when an entry
is added or updated. From the menu bar icon you can:

  • see the most recent games / updates (click to open the page),
  • choose which platforms to be notified about (PS2 / PS3 / PS4 / PS5 / PSN),
  • set the check interval (15 / 30 / 60 minutes),
  • start it automatically at login.

First time only: if no banners appear, open System Settings → Notifications,
find "terminal-notifier" and turn notifications on. DLPS Notify uses it to
deliver banners.

Source & updates: https://github.com/knutwurst/dlps-notify
